craftLab.metaDescription: Pick a base item, use orbs and essences from a stash, and compare outcomes with Path of Exile 2. Simulator rules; not a 1:1 game client.
craftLab.title: Crafting lab
craftLab.intro: Select a base on the left, then spend currency from the stash on the right. Behaviour follows this project’s simulator code (basicCurrencyOrbs, essence). Divine Orb and omens are not implemented yet.
craftLab.pickBaseHint: Pick a row to load a normal item on that base.
craftLab.stashDepleted: Not enough of that currency in the stash.
craftLab.divineDisabledHint: Divine Orb: numeric rolls are not modeled in this app.
craftLab.omenDisabledHint: Omens are not wired to manual crafting yet.
